src/types.rs:56-114

Coverage: 3.7% (1/27 lines)

Uncovered lines: 57, 72, 78-83, 86, 94-99, 102, 106-111

```rust
impl Deserialize for WebFetchRequest
```

Custom deserializer with validation for timeout (1-120s) and max_content_length (1024-10MB). Needs tests for:
1. Valid deserialization with all fields
2. Timeout out of range (0, 121) → error
3. max_content_length out of range (0, 11MB) → error
4. Valid edge cases (timeout=1, timeout=120, etc.)
Add tests for WebFetchRequest deserialization validation
